name: DocuSign
description: DocuSign is the most widely used e-signature platform, trusted by hundreds of thousands of companies worldwide. Beyond e-signatures, it offers contract lifecycle management (CLM), identity verification, and notarisation.
use_cases: Your contracts need to be legally binding across multiple countries and you need a brand that counterparties already trust
You send high volumes of documents and need bulk sending, reusable templates, and full audit trails for compliance
Your legal or finance team needs contract lifecycle management beyond just collecting signatures
You're integrating e-signatures into your own application and need a robust API with webhook support
